_skip_reasons.apiCreateDynamicComponent.spec.ts::rende: Exercises setHtml on a fallback element. vue-lynx intentionally implements setHtml as a warning no-op because Lynx elements cannot parse HTML strings.
_skip_reasons.apiCreateVaporApp.spec.ts::ssr mount sho: Requires browser SSR hydration fallback. Lynx has no SSR hydration surface and always mounts a fresh page root.
_skip_reasons.apiCreateVaporApp.spec.ts::unmount in no: The installed runtime-vapor ESM bundle is compiled with development instance retention, so mutating the test-only __DEV__ global cannot reproduce the source build's production-only app bookkeeping branch.
_skip_reasons.apiInject.spec.ts::transition out-in def: Exercises upstream VaporTransition CSS timing. Lynx provides its own transition implementation with intentionally different semantics.
_skip_reasons.apiInject.spec.ts::should inject value f: Requires VDOM/Vapor interop, which vue-lynx intentionally does not support because upstream interop is tied to the browser renderer singleton.
_skip_reasons.apiInject.spec.ts::slotted vapor child s: Requires VDOM/Vapor interop, which vue-lynx intentionally does not support because upstream interop is tied to the browser renderer singleton.
_skip_reasons.block.spec.ts::insert: Asserts browser DOM exception behavior for an invalid self-anchor. Lynx ShadowElement insertion only receives renderer-validated anchors and intentionally does not implement this browser error contract.
_skip_reasons.block.spec.ts::remove: Asserts browser DOM exception behavior when removing a non-child. Lynx ShadowElement removal is an internal renderer operation and intentionally does not expose the browser DOM error contract.
_skip_reasons.componentAttrs.spec.ts::should warn when: Exercises upstream VaporTeleport target insertion and root-attribute bookkeeping. Lynx has its own Teleport implementation and target-resolution contract, so these browser VaporTeleport semantics are intentionally different.

Exercises an upstream VaporTeleport root inside a dynamic branch. Lynx has its own Teleport implementation and target-resolution contract, so these browser VaporTeleport semantics are intentionally different.
_skip_reasons.componentSlots.spec.ts::initSlots: insta: Compares enumerable browser Element fields. ShadowElement intentionally exposes an enumerable renderer uid, so object-shape equality with a freshly allocated node is not a portable DOM assertion.
_skip_reasons.componentSlots.spec.ts::vdom slot does n: Requires VDOM/Vapor interop, which vue-lynx intentionally does not support because upstream interop is tied to the browser renderer singleton.
_skip_reasons.componentSlots.spec.ts::vdom slot ignore: Requires VDOM/Vapor interop, which vue-lynx intentionally does not support because upstream interop is tied to the browser renderer singleton.
_skip_reasons.componentSlots.spec.ts::vdom slot does n: Requires VDOM/Vapor interop, which vue-lynx intentionally does not support because upstream interop is tied to the browser renderer singleton.
_skip_reasons.componentSlots.spec.ts::compiled slot do: Spies on browser Node.prototype.insertBefore. Lynx constructor shims classify ShadowElement with Symbol.hasInstance and intentionally do not share the browser Node prototype.

_skip_reasons.directives/customDirective.spec.ts::shou: Asserts that a directive receives an HTMLDivElement. Vue Lynx intentionally exposes ShadowElement instances instead of browser HTMLElement subclasses.
_skip_reasons.dom/template.spec.ts::create element: Asserts browser HTMLDivElement constructors. Vue Lynx intentionally creates ShadowElement nodes instead of browser HTMLElement subclasses.

_skip_reasons.errorHandling.spec.ts::in direct dom eve: Exercises upstream DOM modifier invokers and delegated element expando handlers. vue-lynx intentionally overrides on/delegate and routes Lynx events through bindEvent/catchEvent.

_skip_reasons.if.spec.ts::should preserve no-scope pen: Exercises upstream VaporTransition CSS timing and requestAnimationFrame behavior. Lynx provides its own transition implementation, so these browser transition semantics are intentionally different.
_skip_reasons.if.spec.ts::should not set branch block: Asserts upstream VaporTransition block-key bookkeeping. Lynx provides its own transition implementation, so these browser transition internals are intentionally different.
_skip_reasons.if.spec.ts::should set branch block key: Asserts upstream VaporTransition block-key bookkeeping. Lynx provides its own transition implementation, so these browser transition internals are intentionally different.

_excluded_file_reasons.components/Suspense.spec.ts: Depends on Suspense internals and async DOM boundary semantics not yet supported by this focused harness.
_excluded_file_reasons.components/Teleport.spec.ts: Requires browser selector targets and DOM move semantics that intentionally differ from Lynx Teleport target resolution.
_excluded_file_reasons.components/Transition.spec.ts: Requires browser CSS transition classes, timing, and DOM event semantics that are not Lynx production behavior.
_excluded_file_reasons.components/TransitionGroup.spec.ts: Requires browser layout and CSS move-transition semantics unavailable on the ShadowElement test facade.
_excluded_file_reasons.customElement.spec.ts: Targets browser Custom Elements lifecycle, attributes, and shadow-root behavior, which Lynx does not provide.
_excluded_file_reasons.directives/vModel.spec.ts: Targets browser input, checkbox, radio, select, and composition events that differ from Lynx's detail.value input protocol.
_excluded_file_reasons.dom/event.spec.ts: Targets browser event delegation, bubbling, capture, and timestamp behavior that must not be simulated as Lynx production semantics.
_excluded_file_reasons.dom/hydrateFragment.spec.ts: Depends on browser DOM hydration anchors and fragment adoption internals not implemented by this non-jsdom harness.
_excluded_file_reasons.dom/mathML.spec.ts: Targets MathML namespaces and element constructors, which are not available in Lynx.
_excluded_file_reasons.dom/prop.spec.ts: The entry primarily asserts browser CSSStyleDeclaration, form-control properties, SVG namespaces, and v-html. Lynx style/property semantics intentionally differ, and duplicate titles prevent safe exact-test selection for the remaining portable cases.
_excluded_file_reasons.dom/svg.spec.ts: Targets SVG namespaces and SVG-specific properties, which are not available in Lynx.
_excluded_file_reasons.helpers/useCssVars.spec.ts: Upstream traverses browser DOM blocks and custom elements; vue-lynx intentionally overrides CSS-variable application to traverse ShadowElement blocks, which is covered by the Lynx-specific Vapor tests.
_excluded_file_reasons.hmr.spec.ts: Targets browser/dev-server HMR registration and rerender behavior outside this Node ShadowElement harness.
_excluded_file_reasons.hydration.spec.ts: Depends on browser SSR markup adoption, namespaces, mismatch recovery, and DOM constructors unavailable without jsdom.
_excluded_file_reasons.scopeId.spec.ts: Upstream scope IDs are browser data-v-* attributes and the latter half of this entry is VDOM/Vapor interop; vue-lynx intentionally lowers scope tokens to Lynx native classes instead.
_excluded_file_reasons.vdomInterop.spec.ts: VDOM/Vapor interop is explicitly unsupported because upstream interop is hard-wired to the browser renderer singleton.
